reasoning: The average daily temperature in Bordeaux in early November is roughly 11.5°C, while in early February it is around 7.5°C to 8.0°C. Assuming normal distributions for daily temperatures at this station with standard deviations around 3°C for November and 4.5°C for February, the standard deviation of the difference between the two days is roughly 5.4°C. The expected difference in temperature (February minus November) is approximately -3.5°C. Using a normal approximation, this yields a Z-score of roughly -0.65, meaning there is about a 25% chance that a given resolution date in February will be warmer than the November 9 baseline. Given the omission of the explicit date list, I am estimating for the February 7, 2026 close date.
